CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Martial Apprentice
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: the first step to Martial path of body cultivation, once one become body cultivator they refuse to wield weapon, and will only fight with their body. only by tempering one body through constant fighting can they improve further.\n\nat this stage, Martial Apprentice are equivalent to qi cultivator at Bone Forging realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Martial Warrior
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: Martial Warrior, a body cultivator's bodies are tempered to a certain degree, their muscle strengthened, their tendon harden, their flesh tissue are capable of repairing themselves and much faster speed. at this stage they are equivalent to Qi Cultivator at Qi Gathering realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Martial Master
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: in the Martial Master realm, their power leap from Qi Gathering to Core Shaping realm equivalent, their total health 50% higher compared to Qi Cultivator at Core Shaping realm. their fist yield double the power that of Core Shaping cultivator.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Great Martial Master
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: Great Martial Master, an important milestone for body cultivator, while classified as Golden Core equivalent, they can easily fight head-on with a Nascent Soul cultivator. hurling large boulder become as simple as throwing pebble

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Martial Lord
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: a Martial Lord strength allow them to traverse large distant in a single leap. their fist could pulverize small mountain. they could easily brush off most damage as they marching toward enemy.\n\nMartial Lord are equivalent to qi cultivator at Nascent Soul realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Martial King
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: the upper limit of body cultivation in the lower qi cultivation realm range that lower realm could tolerate, they could pulverize large mountain, cover large distant in a single leap, and tank what would heavily injure normal cultivator

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Martial Grandmaster
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: through repeated bloodshed, one can step into sainthood through body tempering, their bone emitting Saintly qi, tempering their flesh and tendon to an ultimate degree. their bodies have become several times more durable than other Half-Step Saint cultivator, their fist alone could easily break the qi shield of a Saint. at this stage they are equivalent to Half-Step Saint.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Martial Emperor
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: the final step of body tempering before the ascension, preparing one body to tear through the boundary of lower realm. body capable of regrowing, regenerating at incredible rate. pulverizing mountain, and shrug off most form of damage. at this stage they are equivalent to Saint realm cultivator.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Martial Supreme
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: through hard work and sheer will, gathering the necessary Saint Qi for ascension through muscle and body building alone, the pinnacle of lower realm cultivating. \n\n Martial Supreme is equivalent to qi cultivator at Saint King realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Martial Sovereign
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: through sheer will power and the power of one own body, a cultivator has take a step into the realm of immortal, their muscle instinctively grasping Immortal Qi necessary for ascension on it own. \n\nMartial Sovereign is equivalent ot qi cultivator at Immortal Ascension realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Martial Transcendent
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: breaking the barrier of upper realm into the immortal realm with only one own body, their flesh and blood has gained the immortal quality. Martial Transcendent is equivalent to qi cultivator at True Immortal realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Physical Body's Eight Gates
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: opening the eight gate of one own body, breaking the absolute limit placed by the will of heavenly dao, inch closer to godhood through the power of body building, at this stage body cultivator are capable of tearing through the void with their body, traversing large distant in an instant.\n\nPhysical Body's Eight Gates are equivalent to qi cultivator at Half-Step God realm

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Dhama Body
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: the near perfection state of body, turning their very being into a dhama body. their mind are perfectly immune to mental break, body regenerate at impossible speed, shattering sea and continent alike. Dhama Body are equivalent to qi cultivator at True God realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Martial Dao
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: the ultimate body, the supreme flesh and blood, perfection in every way, their entire being has transcended heaven and earth and even the plains of reality itself. the absolute maximum one could achieve with tempering their bodies. Martial Dao are equivalent to qi cultivator at Semi-Creation realm, a realm below Creation realm but above True God. for the power of body tempering could never achieve the act of truly creating heaven and earth.
